title: Week-In-Review: Market Moves, AI Momentum, And What's Next
description: U.S. stocks posted modest gains for the week, extending a strong run amid AI optimism, corporate earnings resilience, and easing geopolitical tensions. Read more here.

title: AEKE’s “Strength In Numbers” Event Showed How AI Fitness Is Becoming More Personalized, Data-Driven, and Surprisingly Human
description: The next phase of connected fitness may not be about streaming another workout class onto a screen. title: Anand Rathore Saw It Coming: How AIWoW — AI Ways of WorkingTM Answered Tomorrow's Crisis Before It Arrived
description: “Where machines evolve to think, humans must evolve to feel together.” There are books that inform. There are books that inspire. And then there are rare books that arrive as a quiet revolution—born from years of dedication to a question the world had not yet learned to ask loudly enough. Anand Rathore, Pioneer of AI Ways of Working and author of AIWoW — AI Ways of WorkingTM, is living that moment right now. title: Boy George releasing AI Karma Chameleon
description: Culture Club singer Boy George is releasing an AI version of Karma Chameleon, more than 40 years after it topped the charts.

title: India is embracing AI at work faster than the world — But fear and bias risk are growing too
description: At the workplace level, 57 percent of Indian respondents said they already use AI tools in their current roles. And 86 percent said they feel equipped to learn and apply AI-related skills — a notably high number.
